news_items.headline: Yankees pitching prospect Carlos Lagrange shut down for six weeks
news_items.summary: New York Yankees right-handed pitching prospect Carlos Lagrange is being shut down for approximately six weeks because of a capsular sprain in his right shoulder, the team announced on Friday, July 3.
